title: GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with GitHub Pages
content: GitHub Pages lets you host a static site for free from any repository. To deploy, fork a repository, go to Settings → Pages, and choose “Deploy from a branch” (main) or “GitHub Actions”. With Actions, select the Next.js workflow, commit, and run it; the site appears in the Actions “deploy” link. The site URL defaults to USERNAME.github.io/REPOSITORY, but can be changed to a custom domain after DNS setup and verification, and you can enforce HTTPS. The process is available for private repos, and the published site stays public.
eventKey: github-beginners-getting-started-github-pages
normalizedTitle: github for beginners getting started with github pages

项目仓库：cdkjframework/knowledge-base 许可证：MulanPSL-2.0 一、项目概览

WIKI 知识库是一款本地优先的私有知识库服务，集成了向量检索与**对话式问答（RAG）**能力。它通过 HTTP API 和 Web 界面向用户提供服务，支持 SSE 流式输出，并内置多用户会话管理、知识库文档管理、模型配置等完整功能。

He aims to become an AI‐agent engineer and secure employment.

title: 690万枚比特币恐被破解，2029年“量子末日”倒计时，银行卡、社交账号也面临风险
content: A Google quantum‑AI study disclosed in March 2026 shows a quantum computer with 500,000 qubits could break Bitcoin’s elliptic‑curve encryption in about nine minutes, threatening roughly 6.9 million BTC whose public keys are already exposed. Google has accelerated its “Quantum Day” to 2029, warning that by then everyday passwords, bank cards, and social accounts could also be cracked. While experts debate the timeline, the cryptographic community is urged to adopt post‑quantum algorithms and quantum‑safe protocols to mitigate the looming risk.

title: sa-token + spring cloud gateway 过滤器顺序问题
content: The order of filters in Spring Cloud Gateway with Sa‑Token is fixed by the framework: Sa‑Token’s `SaReactorFilter` is a `WebFilter`, so it runs before any `GlobalFilter`. Thus `Auth` executes first, followed by `TraceId`, `Blacklist`, `RequestContext`, XSS/SQL injection checks, rate limiting, logging, JWT blacklist, forward auth, and finally business logic. Context cleanup occurs last. The supplied list shows relative orders within each filter type, but `Auth` cannot be moved to the 8th position unless it is converted to a `GlobalFilter`.
eventKey: sa-token-spring-cloud-gateway-过滤器顺序问题
normalizedTitle: sa-token spring cloud gateway 过滤器顺序问题

content:
🚀 即插即用的 Vue 3 业务组件库，让中后台开发回归简单 Ease UI 是一套为「快速复制」而生的 Vue 3 业务组件库。每个组件都是独立的 .vue 单文件，不依赖任何外部样式或工具函数，直接复制到你的项目即可使用。它仅依赖 Element Plus，却解决了中后台开发中表格选择混乱、搜索表单代码臃肿、日期范围绑定繁琐等真实痛点，让组件复用像复制代码一样简单。

✨ 新增

• xly-gantt（甘特图组件）src/components/xly-gantt/index.vue

• 项目管理可视化组件，支持日/周/月三种视图切换

• 纯…

title: Semi Design v2.94.0 发布，抖音企业级 UI 库
content:

title: Building Agents at Home: Parenting, Work, and Benevolent Neglect
content: Jesse Genet, a self‑made startup founder and mother, discusses how she builds and runs 11 AI agents to manage coding, curriculum planning, and household tasks while homeschooling four children. She explains the role of agent architecture, logging systems, and a parenting approach she calls “benevolent neglect,” highlighting how these tools reshape her life as both founder and parent. The conversation is hosted by a16z and streamed on multiple platforms.

title: 加密库 libsodium 1.0.22 发布
content:
libsodium 1.0.22 现已发布。此版本更新包含了 1.0.21-stable 版本的所有更改，此外还包括： 后量子密钥封装现已可用。ML-KEM768（the NIST-standardized lattice-based KEM）可通过crypto_kem_mlkem768_*()相关函数调用。
X-Wing 是一种混合型 KEM，它结合了 ML-KEM768 和 X25519，可同时抵御经典和量子攻击，可通过crypto_kem_*()函数调用。X-Wing 是大多数应用场景的推荐 KEM。
SHA-3 哈希函数现在以crypto…

title: TIOBE 4 月榜单：Rust 崛起势头放缓
content:
TIOBE 公布了 2026 年 4 月的编程语言排行榜。 本月榜单主要侧重在 Rust 语言的发展方面。Rust 是 TIOBE 指数前 20 名中最年轻的语言。它于 2020 年 6 月首次进入前 20 名，并被广泛预期将跻身前 10 名，成为 C 和 C++ 的强劲竞争对手。

此后，Rust 的排名稳步提升，甚至在今年年初达到了历史最高点（第 13 位）。然而，仅仅三个月后，它的排名就回落到了第 16 位。

TIOBE CEO Paul Jansen 点评称，这表明 Rust 的采用率可能已趋于平稳。一种可能的解释是，尽管 Rust…
source: 开源中国-全部 - 白开水不加糖
